title: 心愛溶けるビターチョコレート 2話 償いの奮闘

script.text: う～ん、このアイドルの曲は参考になるかも……

translations.en: Hmm‚ this idol's song might be a good reference…

script.text: 要チェックですね！

translations.en: I need to check it out!

script.text: ようし、MVの次はライブ映像を――

translations.en: Alright‚ after the music video‚ let's watch the live footage――

script.text: こころ、お茶淹れてきたから、一休み

translations.en: Kokoro‚ I brought some tea‚ take a break.

script.text: ――って、あ痛ーーっ！

translations.en: Oops‚ ow!

script.text: 何これ！？

translations.en: What's this!?

script.text: 床、すっごい散らかってるんだけど！？

translations.en: The floor is incredibly messy!

script.text: 愛、これはライブ映像のDVDとかブルーレイだよ

translations.en: Ai‚ these are live concert DVDs and Blu-rays.

script.text: 全部借り物だから、踏んじゃダメだよ？

translations.en: They're all borrowed‚ so don't step on them‚ okay?

script.text: これ、一体何枚あるの！？

translations.en: How many of these are there!?

script.text: 足の踏み場もないよ！

translations.en: There's no space to walk!

script.text: ざっと100枚くらいかなぁ

translations.en: I think there are about 100 of them.

script.text: 雫ちゃんに頼んで貸してもらったの

translations.en: I borrowed them from Shizuku-chan.

script.text: これ、全部観るつもりなの！？

translations.en: Are you planning to watch all of them!?

script.text: それだけじゃないよ。ネットにはまだまだ沢山

translations.en: Not just that. There are still plenty of videos online

script.text: 参考になる映像があるんだから

translations.en: that can be a reference.

script.text: インスピレーションがわくまで

translations.en: Until inspiration strikes‚

script.text: ひたすら研究あるのみだよ

translations.en: I'll focus on studying them.

script.text: こころは可愛くて才能溢れる逸材なだけじゃなく

translations.en: Kokoro is not just a cute and talented prodigy‚

script.text: とっても努力家だから

translations.en: she's also a hard worker.

script.text: 努力はいいけど、最近こころ全然休んでないでしょ？

translations.en: Working hard is good‚ but lately‚ Kokoro hasn't been resting at all.

script.text: レッスンと食事以外、ずっと部屋にこもってるし

translations.en: You've been cooped up in the room‚ except for lessons and meals.

script.text: バレンタインイベントには確かに出たいけど

translations.en: It's true that I want to participate in the Valentine's event‚

script.text: あんまり根を詰め過ぎるのも良くないよ

translations.en: but getting too obsessed isn't good either.

script.text: 大体、こころってチョコ嫌いだよね？

translations.en: Besides‚ Kokoro doesn't like chocolate‚ right?

script.text: なんだかいつものこころと違うから私、心配で……

translations.en: It feels like Kokoro's acting different than usual‚ so I'm worried…

script.text: 愛、何しんみりしてるの？

translations.en: Ai‚ why do you look so gloomy?

script.text: 賞味期限の切れたラーメンでも食べたの？

translations.en: Did you eat expired ramen or something?

script.text: 食べてないし、お腹も壊してないよ！

translations.en: I didn't eat it‚ and my stomach is fine!

script.text: ……愛の言う通り、チョコは好きじゃないよ

translations.en: …As Ai said‚ I don't like chocolate.

script.text: でも、食べる訳じゃないんだし、関係ないよ？

translations.en: But since I'm not eating it‚ it doesn't matter‚ right?

script.text: こころはただ、新曲のセンターを先輩達から奪っちゃう

translations.en: I just thought it would be a good opportunity

script.text: いい機会って思っただけなんだけど

translations.en: to snatch the center position for the new song from our senpais.

script.text: はあ！？　何それ

translations.en: Huh!? What's that supposed to mean?

script.text: はぁ～。愛とこころの間にまた格差が出来ちゃうね

translations.en: Huh~ The gap between Ai and Kokoro is widening again.

script.text: 調子に乗り過ぎ！

translations.en: Don't get carried away!

script.text: いつものこころだった！　心配して損したよ！

translations.en: It's the usual Kokoro! I worried for nothing!

script.text: まぁまぁ。愛も目立てるようにしてあげるから

translations.en: Alright‚ alright. I'll make sure you stand out‚ Ai.

script.text: ……こころの次にだけど

translations.en: …But after Kokoro‚ of course.

script.text: そんなことしなくていいよ！　私も手伝う！

translations.en: You don't have to do that! I'll help too!

script.text: こころだけに任せてたら、新曲が変になっちゃう！

translations.en: If we leave it all to Kokoro‚ the new song might turn out weird!

script.text: そう？　じゃあ、愛の仕事はね～

translations.en: Is that so? Then Ai's job is――

script.text: うーん……とりあえずそこで腹筋千回してて

translations.en: Well… for now‚ do 1‚000 sit-ups there.

script.text: うん！　一、ニ、三……って、筋トレはやらないよ！

translations.en: Yeah! One‚ two‚ three… Hey‚ I'm not doing exercises!

script.text: さすがにごまかせなかったか～

translations.en: Looks like I couldn't trick you~

script.text: バレンタイン曲を考えるんでしょ！

translations.en: You're thinking about the Valentine's song‚ right?

script.text: 今まで思いついたアイデア、教えてよ

translations.en: Tell me all the ideas you've come up with so far.

script.text: はいはい、どうぞ

translations.en: Sure‚ here you go.

script.text: ……え？　このノート三冊、まさか全部なの！？

translations.en: …Huh? Are all these three notebooks filled with ideas!?

script.text: うわっ、びっしり書き込んでる……

translations.en: Wow‚ they're densely written…

script.text: いろいろアイデアは出るんだけど

translations.en: I come up with various ideas‚

script.text: これっていうのが浮かばないんだよね～

translations.en: but I can't think of "the one" among them~

script.text: これ読むだけで、朝になっちゃいそう……

translations.en: Just reading this might make it morning…

script.text: こころを手伝うと言った愛が

translations.en: Ai‚ who said she would help Kokoro‚

script.text: うかつなんだよ～

translations.en: turned out to be careless~

script.text: 恨むなら、自分の中の愚かさ～～

translations.en: If you want to resent someone~~~~

script.text: を恨んで下さい

translations.en: resent your own foolishness~~~

script.text: そういう時に歌う曲じゃないよ！

translations.en: That's not the kind of song to sing in this situation!

script.text: それに愚かなんかじゃないもん！　頑張るんだから！

translations.en: Besides‚ I'm not foolish! I'll do my best!

script.text: ――で、一緒になって企画を練ってたの？

translations.en: So‚ you guys worked together and planned it?

script.text: はっ、はいっ

translations.en: Y-Yes.

script.text: こころが無理してるっぽいから、無茶しないように

translations.en: Since Kokoro seems to be pushing herself‚ make sure she doesn't overdo it.

script.text: 見ててあげて……って頼んだよね？

translations.en: That's what I asked you‚ right? To watch over her…

script.text: はっはいぃ！　すみませんでしたぁ！！

translations.en: Y-Yes‚ I'm sorry!

script.text: いや、そんなに謝らなくてもいいんだけど……

translations.en: No‚ you don't have to apologize so much…

script.text: いいわよ、こころ

translations.en: That's good‚ Kokoro.

script.text: 今の動き、忘れないで

translations.en: Don't forget the movements you just did.

script.text: ありがとうございます～

translations.en: Thank you~

script.text: それもこれも、ひとえに莉央さんの教え方……

translations.en: This is all thanks to Rio-san's way of teaching…

script.text: ……はまあまあですけど

translations.en: …is not bad‚ I guess.

script.text: それをこころの才能が見事に補っていい結果に――

translations.en: But my talent complemented it beautifully and resulted in――

script.text: ……相変わらず、ひと言多い子ね

translations.en: …You always have a lot to say.

script.text: 無理してるのに、レッスンはきっちりこなしている

translations.en: Even though she's pushing herself‚ she's diligently doing her lessons.

script.text: 大した根性だね。……ひと言多いけど

translations.en: She has quite the tenacity… though she talks a lot.

script.text: 練習がおろそかになったら、注意しようと思ってたけど

translations.en: I was planning to warn her if her practice became neglectful…

script.text: ……今のこころには、言えないな

translations.en: …but I can't say it to Kokoro right now.

script.text: 葵さん、私、このままこころを手伝おうと思うんです

translations.en: Aoi-san‚ I've decided to help Kokoro as she is.

script.text: ……やっぱり、こころのことが、なんだか心配で

translations.en: …I'm just a little worried about Kokoro.

script.text: うん、いいよ

translations.en: Yeah‚ that's fine.

script.text: でもおかしいと思ったら、莉央と僕にすぐ連絡して

translations.en: But if you feel something is wrong‚ contact Rio and me immediately.

script.text: ……！！　ありがとうございます！！

translations.en: …!! Thank you very much!!

script.text: 絶対に報告しますので！！

translations.en: I will definitely report it!

script.text: ……体育会系だなぁ

translations.en: …You're quite athletic‚ huh?

script.text: やっ……たっ……！

translations.en: Y-Yes… I did it!

script.text: 出来たーっ！

translations.en: I did it!

script.text: 完璧な企画書が出来たよ！

translations.en: I finished the perfect proposal plan!

script.text: 愛、見て！　この力作かつ傑作を！

translations.en: Ai‚ look! This masterpiece!

script.text: 凄い枚数……それに歌詞や振り付けの案まで……

translations.en: So many pages… and even ideas for lyrics and choreography…

script.text: 本当に頑張ったね、こころ！

translations.en: You really worked hard‚ Kokoro!

script.text: ……すぴー

translations.en: …Snooze…

script.text: ええっ！？　一瞬で寝ちゃってる！

translations.en: Eh!? She fell asleep in an instant!

script.text: ……そんなになるまで、自分を追い込んだんだね

translations.en: …She pushed herself that much‚ huh.

script.text: これならきっと大丈夫だよ

translations.en: But I'm sure it'll be fine.

script.text: だからゆっくり休んで、こころ

translations.en: So take a rest‚ Kokoro.

script.text: むにゃ、莉央さん、葵さん……

translations.en: Mmm‚ Rio-san‚ Aoi-san…

script.text: ごめんなさい……

translations.en: I'm sorry…
――Eh?
